google_business_profile.notes: No Google Business Profile found for 'Nith Digital' in any search. Not indexed on Google Maps. This is a critical gap for local SEO in Dumfries & Galloway.
google_business_profile.recommendation: CREATE — highest priority. Claim/verify a Google Business Profile with Sanquhar address, service-area business covering all of D&G. Add photos, services, and request reviews from existing clients.

facebook.notes: No Facebook page found for Nith Digital. The URL returned no content. No search results reference a Nith Digital Facebook page in Dumfries or Scotland.
facebook.recommendation: CREATE — important for local trust signals and social proof. Many D&G small businesses use Facebook as primary discovery channel.

instagram.notes: Instagram profile could not be confirmed via web search or fetch (Instagram blocks external scraping). No indexed references to @nithdigital on Instagram found anywhere.
instagram.recommendation: CHECK directly in Instagram app. If not claimed, CREATE and reserve the handle. Use for portfolio showcases, before/after website builds, local D&G content.

personal_profile.notes: No LinkedIn profile found for 'Akin Yavuz' connected to Nith Digital, Dumfries, or Scotland in web search results. A profile for 'Akin Yavuz' at CAR2U (Northumbria University) was found but may be outdated or a different person.
personal_profile.recommendation: UPDATE or CREATE personal LinkedIn profile clearly stating: Founder at Nith Digital, Sanquhar, Scotland. Senior BI Developer background. Link to nithdigital.uk.

company_page.notes: No LinkedIn company page found for Nith Digital.
company_page.recommendation: CREATE — LinkedIn company page for Nith Digital. Important for B2B credibility, especially for dashboard/BI services.

twitter_x.notes: X/Twitter returned error code 50 (user not found) for @nithdigital. No tweets or account found referencing Nith Digital.
twitter_x.recommendation: LOW PRIORITY — reserve the handle but X is less important for local Scottish web design than Google, Facebook, and LinkedIn.

github.notes: Active GitHub presence with relevant repos. NithDigital main repo is public. No bio visible. Profile could be enriched with avatar, bio, and links.
github.recommendation: ENHANCE — add profile bio, avatar, link to nithdigital.uk. Consider making client repos private if not already.

companies_house.notes: No company registered as 'Nith Digital' or 'Nith Digital Ltd' on Companies House. A 'NITH LTD' (company 15558158) exists but is based in Dagenham, London — retail/financial intermediation, unrelated. Business likely operates as sole trader under Akin Yavuz's name.
companies_house.recommendation: No action needed unless wanting Ltd status. Sole trader is fine for current scale.

directory_listings.notes: Zero directory listings found across all major UK business directories and agency listing platforms.
directory_listings.recommendation: CREATE listings on at least: Yell.com, FreeIndex, Google Business Profile (covered above). Consider Bark and PeoplePerHour for lead generation. Clutch/DesignRush for agency credibility.

trustpilot.notes: 404 — no Trustpilot profile exists for nithdigital.uk

google_reviews.notes: No Google Business Profile means no Google reviews possible

facebook_reviews.notes: No Facebook page means no Facebook reviews

review_platforms.recommendation: After creating Google Business Profile and Trustpilot page, actively request reviews from existing clients (Tumble Tots, etc.).

mentions_and_press.notes: No press mentions, blog features, awards, or third-party references to Nith Digital found anywhere on the web. The business has essentially zero external footprint beyond its own website and GitHub.
mentions_and_press.recommendation: Seek local press coverage (Dumfries & Galloway Standard, DGWGO). Submit to Scottish business awards. Guest post on local business blogs.

seo_observations.domain_indexed: Website is live and fetchable but does not appear in search results for key terms like 'web design Dumfries and Galloway', 'Nith Digital', or 'nithdigital.uk'.
seo_observations.notes: Nith Digital does not appear in any 'web design Scotland' or 'web design Dumfries and Galloway' search results. The location-specific town pages on the site are a good SEO strategy but are not yet ranking. The domain nithdigital.uk is also not being confused with nithdigital.com (a Singapore-based agency) — they are completely separate businesses.
seo_observations.recommendation: Focus on: (1) Google Business Profile for local pack, (2) directory citations for domain authority, (3) blog content targeting 'web design [D&G town]' keywords, (4) backlinks from local businesses/organisations.

nithdigital_com.name: NITH Digital Solutions Pte. Ltd.
nithdigital_com.services: ERP customisation, system integration, mobile apps, web apps, grant applications
nithdigital_com.notes: Completely separate business. Singapore-based SME digital agency. Shares name similarity but different domain (.com vs .uk), different geography, different services. Not a direct competitor but could cause brand confusion in generic searches.

critical_gaps: No Google Business Profile — cannot appear in local search/maps
No reviews anywhere — zero social proof for prospective clients
No social media presence — invisible on Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn
No directory citations — hurts domain authority and local SEO
Website not ranking for any target keywords
